notes: A reduction rewrites a formula over one basis (def:connective-basis) into a logically equivalent (def:logical-equivalence) formula over a smaller/different basis, relying on definability (def:definable-connective). All three load-bearing and present. Note this node correctly cites def:logical-equivalence for 'logically equivalent' -- the convention that makes the NAND/NOR omissions (0054/0057) stand out.
